2605.19665.title: CriterAlign: Criterion-Centric Rationale Alignment for Code Preference Judging
2605.19665.paper_summary: Pairwise human preference prediction is central to evaluating code-generation systems, where quality often depends on task-specific trade-offs beyond functional correctness. While rubric-based LLM judges improve interpretability by decomposing evaluation into explicit criteria, most existing pipelines remain pointwise: they score each response independently and derive preferences by comparing aggregated scores. We show that this design is poorly matched to pairwise code preference prediction and can underperform a strong monolithic judge. We propose CriterAlign, a criterion-centric framework that adapts rubric-based judging to pairwise preference evaluation through direct criterion-level pairwise judgments, tie-driven criterion refinement, swap-consistency filtering, and final pairwise synthesis. We further introduce Human-Preference-Aligned Guidance (HPAG), synthesized offline from training examples by extracting recurring rationale gaps between human preferences and monolithic judge predictions, and injected into the criterion generator, criterion judge, and final judge. On BigCodeReward, CriterAlign improves a Qwen2.5-VL-32B monolithic judge from 60.4% to 66.3% accuracy, with ablations confirming the contributions of pairwise criterion design and HPAG.
2605.19665.paper_summary_zh: 成對人類偏好預測是評估代碼生成系統的核心，其中質量往往取決於超越功能正確性的任務特定權衡。雖然基於評分標準的 LLM 評審通過將評估分解為明確的標準來提高可解釋性，但大多數現有的流程仍然是逐點的：它們獨立評分每個回應，並通過比較聚合得分來推導偏好。我們顯示這種設計與成對代碼偏好預測不匹配，並且可能表現不如強大的單一評審。我們提出 CriterAlign，一個以標準為中心的框架，通過直接的標準級成對判斷、基於平局的標準細化、交換一致性過濾和最終成對合成，將基於評分標準的評審適應於成對偏好評估。我們進一步介紹了人類偏好對齊引導（HPAG），這是通過提取人類偏好與單一評審預測之間的重複理由差距，從訓練示例中離線合成的，並注入到標準生成器、標準評審和最終評審中。在 BigCodeReward 上，CriterAlign 將 Qwen2.5-VL-32B 單一評審的準確率從 60.4% 提高到 66.3%，消融實驗確認了成對標準設計和 HPAG 的貢獻。
2605.19665.author: Zhenyu Li et.al.
2605.19665.authors: Zhenyu Li, Aleksandar Cvejic, Zehui Chen, Peter Wonka
